Jinx.dialogue.Intro: Her gaze is so emotional, like she knows something truly heartbreaking.
Jinx.dialogue.1: Jinx is looking a bit chunkier.
Bubba.dialogue.Intro: His eyes are full of wonder, his life is new and curious.
Bubba.dialogue.1: Bubba's acting a bit frisky today.
Bubba.dialogue.2: He huffs at you, just like Jinx does.
